title: Urgent Opening Category Manager at Fire-Boltt

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Category Manager at Fire-Boltt
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Fire-Boltt! We are hiring a Category Manager for our Allahabad team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Fire-Boltt:
Fire-Boltt is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in WooCommerce

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Referral bonus program
• Learning & development budget
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Fire-Boltt!
